subject: Proposal Discussion
body: Hi John, sharing the proposal. Let me know your thoughts.

subject: Re: Proposal Discussion
body: Thanks Alice. Looks interesting but pricing seems higher than expected.

subject: Re: Proposal Discussion
body: We can explore flexible pricing options. Happy to discuss.

subject: Re: Proposal Discussion
body: We are also evaluating CompetitorX which is offering a discount.

subject: Proposal Sent
body: Hi Emily, sharing proposal for cloud migration.

subject: Re: Proposal Sent
body: Thanks. We need internal approval. Might take time.

subject: Final Negotiation
body: Hi Mike, checking if we can close this week.
